extracted_claim: The package surface looked damaged with a wet-looking stain when it arrived.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The affected package surface is visible clearly enough to assess the stain and water damage, satisfying REQ_PACKAGE_LABEL_OR_STAIN.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows a prominent dark, wet-looking stain running down the side and corner of the cardboard package, consistent with water damage. The cardboard also appears softened and slightly compromised in the affected area.
